result.stdout:
Description:
  Removes UTF-8 BOM markers from text files.

Usage:
  unbom <argument> [options]

Arguments:
  <argument>  Path to scan.

Options:
  --recurse       recurse subdirectories. [default: False]
  --nobackup      do not save a backup file. [default: True]
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
